picks.reasoning: Spain sit at 1.97 — the only option across all three matches that falls within our target range. They arrive at this World Cup as one of the most cohesive tactical units in international football, with a deep squad and a proven system under De la Fuente. Portugal have the individual quality but historically struggle for consistency in knockout formats against top-tier opposition, and Spain's recent H2H record supports the lean.

Mexico at home soil vibes with the crowd going mental trying to keep England up all night — that's a real factor bro. England always look shaky in knockout rounds and the weather delay chaos suits the underdogs. Value at 3.15 is too good to ignore when Mexico have every reason to cause an upset.

Portugal at 4.30 in a World Cup knockout derby?! Cristiano and the boys are playing on home continent soil with a point to prove, and Iberian derbies are NEVER straightforward — Spain might be favorites but this fixture has upset written all over it. The bookies are handing us free money and I am absolutely taking it with both hands!
